business_ideas.idea: Flexport: modern freight-forwarding software for international shipping logistics
Zapier: connect and automate any APIs without coding, build entire workflows
Uniswap: decentralized exchange for trading any crypto-to-crypto, $10B weekly volume
Anduril: defense-tech drones and autonomous surveillance for government border/security
Replit: browser-based sandbox for coding, learning, and social code remixing
Airtable: cloud spreadsheet alternative to Excel, database-like power
Figma: cloud-based collaborative design tool replacing Photoshop
Rippling: payroll plus device management and HR for onboarding employees
OpenStore: acquire and consolidate Shopify e-commerce stores at scale
NextHealth: unified medical records platform and health-data app ecosystem
OneTrust: GDPR compliance and privacy law automation for enterprises

predictions.text: Flexport can be worth $50B+ in 5 years, take $250M seed stake from SoftBank
Zapier will become $25-50B company within 5 years, already outpaced GitHub growth
Uniswap does $10B weekly trading volume with 35 employees, likely $1B+ ARR this year
Anduril can be worth $20-50B in 5 years despite controversial founder Palmer Lucky
Rippling could 30-50x from $1.3B valuation, top candidate for appreciation on this list
OpenStore's roll-up model is fastest path to billion-dollar company, could 10x from $250M
Airtable could reach $20-30B valuation, Excel market cap may be $100B
Figma could 5x+ in value; Adobe grew 6x in 5 years and Figma grows faster
